## Linked issue

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Data correctness fix (P0)
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor / internal change
- [ ] Docs only
- [ ] CI / build / chore

## Checklist

- [ ] I have read the [Contributing guide](../CONTRIBUTING.md).
- [ ] My commits are signed off (DCO): `git commit -s`.
- [ ] I added or updated tests covering the change.
- [ ] `uv run pytest` passes locally.
- [ ] `uv run ruff check .` and `uv run ruff format --check .` pass locally.
- [ ] For data/cost changes: I cite a primary source (NSE/BSE/SEBI/broker doc) for any numerical change.
- [ ] For new public APIs: I added docstrings and an example.
